title: juncus tenageia subsp. acicularis
intro: Juncus tenageia subsp. acicularis, also known as Needle Rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Juncus tenageia subsp. acicularis include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions.
